examples: Challenge: Bringing Wolfram Alpha to More users.
The latest version includes support for Wolfram Alpha, too.
Now, with Wolfram Alpha, you'll get a straightforward answer.
Same with stocks apps, calculator apps, dictionary apps, and even broad-knowledge ones like those for Wolfram Alpha or Wikipedia.
Note: It seems that Facebook has limited Wolfram's API calls, so you might get an error when accessing the tool for now.
